creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
Please repocopy www/neon to www/neon26 and to www/neon28.

Neon 0.28 is not backwards compatible with Neon 0.26, and to progress
in the world of WebDAV we need to move on.

Once the repocopy is done, I will change all involved ports to
depend on www/neon26 and upgrade the ones which were lagging behind
due to the absence of Neon 0.28. After that I will chase the upgrades
of the ones which do support 0.28.
